properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When upon the clouds of heaven, Christ shall come to earth again. Will the world be glad to see Him, When our Lord shall come again?

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There’ll be singing, there’ll be shouting, There’ll be sorrow, there’ll be pain, There’ll be weeping, there’ll be praying, When our Lord shall come again.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Will his coming bring rejoicing? Or will it bring tears and pain? Are you ready to receive Him, When our Lord shall come again?

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Will you join in lamentation? Or the angel’s glad refrain? Will you help His people crown Him, When our Lord shall come again?

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Work and pray till Jesus calls you. Help to gather in the grain, Then with joy you’ll meet the Saviour, When our Lord shall come again.
